stages.concept:
# Unit 149: I wish + 가정법 과거 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **I wish + 가정법 과거**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I wish I **were** taller.
> 내가 키가 더 컸으면 좋겠다. (실제: 키가 크지 않다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **I wish + 주어 + 과거동사** — 현재 이루지 못한 소망

> I wish I **had** more free time.
> 자유 시간이 더 많았으면 좋겠다. (실제: 시간이 없다)

> I wish I **could** fly.
> 내가 날 수 있으면 좋겠다. (실제: 날 수 없다)

> She wishes she **lived** near the school.
> 그녀는 학교 근처에 살면 좋겠다고 생각한다. (실제: 멀리 산다)

> I wish I **knew** the answer.
> 답을 알면 좋겠다. (실제: 모른다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: be동사는 **were**를 써요 (가정법이니까!)

> I wish I **were** rich.
> 부자였으면 좋겠다.

> I wish it **were** sunny today.
> 오늘 맑았으면 좋겠다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"I wish I (       ) speak Chinese well." (내가 중국어를 잘 할 수 있으면 좋을 텐데.)
1. can
2. could ✅
3. will

👩‍🏫 선생님: 현재 사실에 대한 소망/아쉬움을 나타내는 'I wish 가정법 과거' 구문이므로 조동사도 과거형인 could를 써야 합니다. 실제로는 중국어를 잘하지 못해서 아쉽다는 뜻이에요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: I wish + 과거동사 = 현재 이루지 못한 소망! be동사는 were! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 149: I wish + 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 가정법 과거 문장을 완성하시오.
I wish I (know) how to dance.
> **정답** knew

---

**02.** I wish she (be) here with me.
> **정답** were

---

**03.** I wish I (have) more free time.
> **정답** had

---

**04.** I wish I (can) fly.
> **정답** could

---

**05.** I wish he (be) my friend.
> **정답** were

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wish I am taller.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** am → were

---

**07.** I wish she is here.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → were

---

**08.** I wish I have a dog.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → had

---

**09.** I wish I can speak English well.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** can → could

---

**10.** I wish he lives near my house.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** lives → lived

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
키가 더 크면 좋겠다.
I wish I taller.
> **정답** were

---

**12.** 강아지가 있으면 좋겠다.
I wish I a dog.
> **정답** had

---

**13.** 영어를 잘하면 좋겠다.
I wish I speak English well.
> **정답** could

---

**14.** 그녀가 여기 있으면 좋겠다.
I wish she here.
> **정답** were

---

**15.** 시간이 더 있으면 좋겠다.
I wish I more time.
> **정답** had

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
새처럼 날 수 있으면 좋겠다.
I wish could I fly like a bird
> **정답** I / wish / I / could / fly / like / a / bird

---

**17.** 그녀가 내 친구이면 좋겠다.
I wish were she my friend
> **정답** I / wish / she / were / my / friend

---

**18.** 기타를 칠 줄 알면 좋겠다.
I wish could I play the guitar
> **정답** I / wish / I / could / play / the / guitar

---

**19.** 돈이 더 많으면 좋겠다.
I wish had I more money
> **정답** I / wish / I / had / more / money

---

**20.** 내가 용감하면 좋겠다.
I wish were I brave
> **정답** I / wish / I / were / brave
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 149: I wish + 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을
완성하시오.
I wish she ___________ my friend.
will be
were
is
be
> **정답** were

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을
완성하시오.
I wish my father ______________________ me a new
iPhone.
could buy
will buy
can buy
buys
> **정답** could buy

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을
완성하시오.
I wish you ______________________ the English
exam.
didn't fail
don't fail
would have not failed
won't fail
> **정답** didn't fail

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을
완성하시오.
I wish we ______________________ forever.
didn't have to study
have not have to study
don't have to study
won't have to study
> **정답** didn't have to study

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을
완성하시오.
I wish she ______________________ enough time to
exercise.
have
had
has
will have
> **정답** had

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I'm not as smart as my brother.
I wish I'm not as smart as my brother.
I wish I were as smart as my brother.
I wish I were not as smart as my brother.
I wish I'm as smart as my brother.
> **정답** I wish I were as smart as my brother.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I don't have a lot of friends here.
I wish I have a lot of friends here.
I wish I didn't have a lot of friends here.
I wish I don't have a lot of friends here.
I wish I had a lot of friends here.
> **정답** I wish I had a lot of friends here.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I am sorry that I can't speak English well.
I wish I couldn't speak English well.
I wish I can speak English well.
I wish I can't speak English well.
I wish I could speak English well.
> **정답** I wish I could speak English well.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I can't see my friends more often.
I wish I can't see my friends more often.
I wish I could see my friends more often.
I wish I couldn't see my friends more often.
I wish I can see my friends more often.
> **정답** I wish I could see my friends more often.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that the boy will try such a dangerous thing.
I wish the boy wouldn't try such a dangerous
thing.
I wish the boy won't try such a dangerous
thing.
I wish the boy would try such a dangerous
thing.
I wish the boy will try such a dangerous thing.
> **정답** I wish the boy wouldn't try such a dangerous thing.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish my father were not sick.
I wish he comes here early.
I wish I could swim well.
I wish it didn't rain.
> **정답** I wish he comes here early.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish my brother doesn't waste money any
more.
I wish he could do it quickly.
I wish my mom gave me more money.
I wish she liked me.
> **정답** I wish my brother doesn't waste money any more.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish the man helped the poor.
I wish she could smile at me.
I wish the weather will be fine tomorrow.
I wish you could be more generous to others.
> **정답** I wish the weather will be fine tomorrow.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I could be with you all the time.
I wish my computer worked faster.
I wish I have a brother or a sister.
I wish he would come and say hello.
> **정답** I wish I have a brother or a sister.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish Chris sent me a birthday gift.
I wish you are not that busy now.
I wish David could do it for us.
I wish Sally answered my phone.
> **정답** I wish you are not that busy now.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 너의 숙제를 도울 수 있으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I will help you with your homework.
I wish I could help you with your homework.
I wish I could have helped you with your
homework.
I wish I can help you with your homework.
> **정답** I wish I could help you with your homework.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 중국어를 잘 할 수 있으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I can speak Chinese well.
I wish I will speak Chinese well.
I wish I will be able to speak Chinese well.
I wish I could speak Chinese well.
> **정답** I wish I could speak Chinese well.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
선생님께서 우리에게 숙제를 주지 않으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish the teacher doesn't give us homework.
I wish the teacher didn't give us homework.
I wish the teacher gave us homework.
I wish the teacher won't give us homework.
> **정답** I wish the teacher didn't give us homework.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wish she is my roommate
now.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → were

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wish I have more free time
now.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → had
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 149 I wish + 가정법 과거 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I'm sorry that I am not good at swimming.
→ I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 I, were, good, at, swimming

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I'm sorry that I can't run fast.
→ I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 I, could, run, fast

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형 사용)
I wish I could help you with your homework.
→ I am sorry that  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 I, can't (can not), help, you, with, your, homework

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형 사용)
I wish he were here with me.
→ I am sorry that  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 he, isn't (is not), here, with, me

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 누나처럼 그림을 잘 그리면 좋을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) be good at painting
I wish I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  like my sister.
정답 were, good, at, painting

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 우주에 갈 수 있으면 좋을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) can, go to space
I wish I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 could, go, to, space

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내 방에 에어컨이 있다면 좋을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) have an air conditioner
I wish I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in my room.
정답 had, an, air, conditioner

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리가 숙제가 없다면 좋을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) have, homework
I wish we  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 didn't (did not), have, homework

---

**09.** 아래 가정법 과거 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게
고쳐쓰세요.
I  [wish]  I  [can]  [speak]  [more]
[than]  [one]  [language]  [now.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 can → could

---

**10.** 아래 가정법 과거 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게
고쳐쓰세요.
I  [wish]  [Sarah]  [and]  I  [go]  [to]
[the]  [same]  [high]  [school.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 go → went

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 149: I wish + 가정법 과거 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을 완성하시오.
I wish he ___________ my neighbor. will be were is be
> 정답: were

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을 완성하시오.
I wish my mom ______________________ me a new bicycle. could buy will buy can buy buys
> 정답: could buy

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을 완성하시오.
I wish you ______________________ the math exam.
didn't fail don't fail would have not failed won't fail
> 정답: didn't fail

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을 완성하시오.
I wish we ______________________ forever.
didn't have to clean have not have to clean don't have to clean won't have to clean
> 정답: didn't have to clean

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 넣어 가정법 과거문장을 완성하시오.
I wish he ______________________ enough money to travel. have had has will have
> 정답: had

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I'm not as tall as my sister.
I wish I'm not as tall as my sister.
I wish I were as tall as my sister.
I wish I were not as tall as my sister.
I wish I'm as tall as my sister.
> 정답: I wish I were as tall as my sister.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I don't have a pet at home.
I wish I have a pet at home.
I wish I didn't have a pet at home.
I wish I don't have a pet at home.
I wish I had a pet at home.
> 정답: I wish I had a pet at home.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I am sorry that I can't play the guitar well.
I wish I couldn't play the guitar well.
I wish I can play the guitar well.
I wish I can't play the guitar well.
I wish I could play the guitar well.
> 정답: I wish I could play the guitar well.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I can't visit my grandparents more often.
I wish I can't visit my grandparents more often.
I wish I could visit my grandparents more often.
I wish I couldn't visit my grandparents more often.
I wish I can visit my grandparents more often.
> 정답: I wish I could visit my grandparents more often.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that the girl will try such a risky activity.
I wish the girl wouldn't try such a risky activity.
I wish the girl won't try such a risky activity.
I wish the girl would try such a risky activity.
I wish the girl will try such a risky activity.
> 정답: I wish the girl wouldn't try such a risky activity.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish my mother were not busy.
I wish she comes here early.
I wish I could run fast.
I wish it didn't snow.
> 정답: I wish she comes here early.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish my sister doesn't spend money carelessly.
I wish he could finish it quickly.
I wish my dad gave me more allowance.
I wish he liked me.
> 정답: I wish my sister doesn't spend money carelessly.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish the woman helped the elderly.
I wish he could talk to me.
I wish the weather will be warm tomorrow.
I wish you could be more patient with others.
> 정답: I wish the weather will be warm tomorrow.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I could be with my family all the time.
I wish my phone worked properly.
I wish I have a garden.
I wish she would come and greet me.
> 정답: I wish I have a garden.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish Tom invited me to his party.
I wish you are not that tired now.
I wish Amy could do it for us.
I wish he answered my question.
> 정답: I wish you are not that tired now.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 너의 프로젝트를 도울 수 있으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I will help you with your project.
I wish I could help you with your project.
I wish I could have helped you with your project.
I wish I can help you with your project.
> 정답: I wish I could help you with your project.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 프랑스어를 잘 할 수 있으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I can speak French well.
I wish I will speak French well.
I wish I will be able to speak French well.
I wish I could speak French well.
> 정답: I wish I could speak French well.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
코치가 우리에게 추가 연습을 시키지 않으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish the coach doesn't give us extra practice.
I wish the coach didn't give us extra practice.
